evals.prompt: List all Volcano jobs in the cluster
evals.expected_output: List of Volcano Jobs using kubectl get jobs.batch.volcano.sh -A

evals.prompt: Create a PyTorch distributed training job named pytorch-train in the default namespace
evals.expected_output: YAML manifest for Job (kind: Job) with kubectl apply command

evals.prompt: Delete the Volcano job named pytorch-train
Show the detailed status of the quickstart-job in the default namespace
evals.expected_output: kubectl describe vcjob or kubectl get with full details

evals.prompt: Create a queue named ml-queue with weight 50
Update the ml-queue weight from 50 to 60
evals.expected_output: kubectl patch queue ml-queue or API PUT command with new weight

evals.prompt: List all Volcano jobs on the member-4 cluster
evals.expected_output: kubectl command with member cluster kubeconfig or ks_api with cluster param

evals.prompt: Try to delete a non-existent job fake-job-xxx, what happens
evals.expected_output: Error handling: 'NotFound' or similar error message from kubectl/api
